title: acinos alpinus subsp. aetnensis
intro: Acinos alpinus subsp. aetnensis, also known as the Etna alpine calamint, is a subspecies of the Acinos alpinus plant, a perennial herb native to the Mediterranean region. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and antispasmodic effects, making it useful for treating digestive issues, reducing fever, and alleviating respiratory problems. The health benefits of Etna alpine calamint include its ability to soothe digestive issues, reduce inflammation, and act as a natural remedy for colds and flu. Herbal preparations of Acinos alpinus subsp. aetnensis can be consumed as a tea, infused in oil for topical use, or added to salads for its flavor and medicinal properties.
